voice_lines.label: ElderMara_GroundTremor
voice_lines.text: Listen. The ground speaks before the beast arrives. Feel the tremor through your feet — that rhythm, heavy and slow, means something enormous is moving through the valley. Count the beats. One... two... three... If they grow faster, it is running. If they stop, it has caught your scent. Do not move. Do not breathe. Let the earth go quiet again.
voice_lines.gameplay_mechanic: Teaches player to use ground vibration as T-Rex proximity sensor — stop moving, feel the rhythm, assess direction

voice_lines.label: Tracker_Dak_RaptorSilence
voice_lines.text: The raptors hunt in silence. You will not hear them coming — but you will hear everything else go quiet first. The insects stop. The birds lift. The wind holds its breath. That silence is the warning. When the world goes still, you run. You do not look back. You do not stop to think. You run.
voice_lines.gameplay_mechanic: Teaches ambient silence mechanic — insect/bird audio dropout = raptor ambush incoming, player must sprint

ambient_sound_assets.name: Forest river near waterfalls
ambient_sound_assets.use_case: Waterfall ambient — landmark audio beacon for player navigation

audio_trigger_zones.purpose: Master ambient audio zone for hub — activates full ambient soundscape on entry

audio_trigger_zones.purpose: Campfire proximity trigger — plays campfire crackle + ElderMara campfire warning dialogue

audio_trigger_zones.label: AudioTrigger_ForestEdge_Raptor_001
audio_trigger_zones.purpose: Forest edge raptor zone — triggers ambient silence mechanic + Tracker_Dak raptor warning

audio_trigger_zones.label: AudioTrigger_TRex_Tremor_001
audio_trigger_zones.purpose: T-Rex patrol proximity — triggers ground tremor mechanic + ElderMara tremor warning

ElderMara: TTS-1: ElderMara_CampfireWarning — fire crackle = predator proximity indicator
TTS-5: ElderMara_WinterSurvival — follow predator kill sites for food
TTS-7: ElderMara_GroundTremor — count ground tremor beats to assess T-Rex
Tracker_Dak: TTS-2: Tracker_Dak_HerdWarning — sauropod herd tracks near hub
TTS-3: Tracker_Dak_ForestReading — insect silence = predator movement
TTS-4: Tracker_Dak_RiverDanger — raptor ambush at river midday
TTS-6: Tracker_Dak_ForestReading2 — bird scatter = 30 seconds warning
TTS-8: Tracker_Dak_RaptorSilence — world goes still = run immediately

audio_design_philosophy.principle: The sound that does not exist is often more powerful than the sound that does — Walter Murch
audio_design_philosophy.ambient_silence_mechanic: Insect/bird audio dropout is the primary danger warning system. Players learn to fear silence more than roars.
audio_design_philosophy.layered_audio_zones: Hub has 3 concentric audio layers: (1) campfire crackle inner, (2) forest ambience mid, (3) distant predator sounds outer
audio_design_philosophy.voice_line_design: All TTS lines teach survival mechanics through character voice — no UI popups, no tutorials. Audio IS the tutorial.
